title: Try to fix buildah-containers.md CI test issue
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

Red Hat CI is failing with DCO failures on this file I think.  I did a minor change to the file and have made sure to sign this, hopefully this will cure the issue.

comments.body: Not sure why this tests failed, probably need to repush
All green buttons, can this be merged?

:pushpin: Commit cf82f32 has been approved by `rhatdan`
